command: echo '=== Check strace for PropFirmBot file ops ===' && grep -i 'PropFirmBot\|Experts' /tmp/me_trace.txt 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '=== Check strace for openat near end of file ===' && tail -100 /tmp/me_trace.txt 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo '=== Check for any .ex5 file ops ===' && grep 'ex5\|\.ex' /tmp/me_trace.txt 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo '=== Check if MetaEditor is running OK now ===' && ps aux | grep -i meta | grep -v grep && echo '=== MT5 status ===' && ps aux | grep -i terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== Check GitHub Actions workflow runs ===' && cd /root/MT5-PropFirm-Bot && git log --oneline -3 && echo '=== Recent EA log ===' && ls -lt '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/' 2>/dev/null | head -5 && EALOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && tail -20 "$EALOG" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' || echo 'No EA log'
